evidence: "Nice departure from the usual vampire flicks"
"If you're a fan of old horror and SciFi movies and Drive-In's than you'll appreciate this."
"Funny and light entertainment. No message or hidden agenda."
"Just plain ol' camp at it's best."
"This is one of the best movies I have seen in a long time. Even if you're not a history buff; you will like this film."
"Enjoy a trip down memory lane....make some (real) popcorn and turn the lights out."
"With all the crap that is on TV/Cable these days - you actually have a well made intelligent show..."
"Nice to see A list actors doing smaller movies well."
"If you spent rainy Saturdays watching old horror and science fiction movies of the 50s & 60s than you will love this."
"This was one of those movies that you never heard about but was a really great film. Nothing Oscar worthy; just a little feel good story."
"If you're looking for Star Wars special effects - skip it. Enjoy a trip down memory lane...."

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly horror and sci-fi, with a preference for light, simple narratives. They appreciate emotional resonance and a nostalgic sensory experience, often favoring independent films and campy classics.
